features.name: module instantiation with same signal connected to multiple clock ports
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the same parent signal is connected to multiple clock ports (e.g., R0_clk and W0_clk) of a child module

features.name: memory array with write-first synchronization and read assignment
features.description: Code should include a memory array (reg [bits] name[depth]) with a synchronous write always block and a continuous assign read path that feeds an output port
